recommendations.overview: An erotic horror tale about a vixen vampiress seducing and killing women to appease her insatiable thirst for female blood.

recommendations.overview: Three students get caught in the struggle between a good vampire and his evil brother in the Transylvanian mountains.

recommendations.overview: A group of high school outcasts get revenge on the students that torment them.

recommendations.title: Rabid

recommendations.title: Good Kids
